needsTemplate.noTextLayer: PDF has no text layer; set up a template via Athena import first
needsTemplate.noTemplate: No saved template for this statement + account; import it once in Athena first
needsTemplate.templateStale: Saved template no longer matches this PDF; re-train it via Athena import

errors.templateYieldedNoRows: Saved template did not match this PDF; re-train it

errors.accountRequiredPhoto: Please select an account to import a photo.
errors.accountRequiredPdf: Please select an account to import PDFs.

batchSummary.needsTemplate_one: {{count}} PDF needs a template — import it individually: {{names}}
batchSummary.needsTemplate_other: {{count}} PDFs need a template — import them individually: {{names}}

description.exportText: : downloads all of your accounts, categories, rules and transactions as JSON (with dedup_key preserved, so re-importing it is idempotent).
description.importText: : replaces ALL data with the contents of the chosen file — handy for switching between instances or testing a roundtrip.

confirmDialog.title: Import this backup?
confirmDialog.descriptionMiddle: current data (accounts, categories, rules, transactions) will be
confirmDialog.descriptionSuffix: then replaced with the contents of the file. The operation is transactional: if it fails partway through, nothing is applied.

description.prefix: These transactions share account + date + amount but have different labels. Likely a duplicate between an OFX import and a PDF import of the same transaction. Check and delete the extra one via the

duplicates.markNotDuplicateTitle: Mark every row in the group as validated — the group will only reappear if a new row with the same amount/date shows up later.
duplicates.similarityTitle: Minimum label similarity of the group (Jaccard on tokens, excluding boilerplate words).

fileImports.viewTransactionsTitle: View the transactions from this import
fileImports.deleteTitle: Delete this import and all its transactions

summary.heading: Last PDF import
summary.noTransactions: No transaction associated with this file — either it was a complete duplicate, or every row was ignored.
summary.dedupedHint: These rows already existed in the database (identical account + date + amount + label). No row was inserted for them.

templates.emptyState: No template saved yet. Templates are created automatically at the end of the wizard after your first PDF import from a new bank.
templates.description: A template describes a bank's layout (table zones, columns, account pages). It's reused automatically for every future PDF from the same bank + account.
templates.legacyWarningSuffix: If a future statement has more pages than the original example, transactions may be skipped. Delete the template then re-import the PDF to switch to content-based filtering.
templates.matchTooltip: Line required on every page belonging to this account
templates.cutTooltip: Markers of other accounts — the lines below are ignored
templates.byPageNumberTitle: Filtering by absolute page numbers — recreate the template to switch to content-based filtering

deleteDialog.title: Delete this template?
deleteDialog.descriptionSuffix: will be deleted. The next PDF import with the same bank fingerprint will relaunch the wizard. Already-imported transactions are not affected.
